dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3616 IS: Expanding Access to Lending Options Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Cortez Masto (for herself and Mr. Cramer) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To provide the National Credit Union Administration Board flexibility to increase Federal credit union loan maturities, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Expanding Access to Lending Options Act.
Section 107(5) of the Federal Credit Union Act (12 U.S.C. 1757(5)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by inserting or up to a term of 20 years as the Board may allow, in regulations after 15 years; and
in subparagraph (A)(i), by striking or will be the principal residence of a credit union member, and which is.
